HomePage.title: COMA
HomePage.subtitle: Church Operations Management App
HomePage.description: A centralized digital ecosystem to manage church operations easily, transparently, and measurably.

app.title: App Management
app.desc: Manage the app's core settings, user roles, permissions, and church profile information.

member.title: Member Management
member.desc: Manage congregation database, membership status, ministry history, and cell group growth.

finance.title: Finance Management
finance.desc: Automated tithe recording system, expense management, and church financial reporting.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.desc: Monitor church asset inventory, facility maintenance schedules, and item borrowing systems.

service.title: Service Management
service.desc: Schedule weekly services, assign ministry volunteers, and organize worship plans.

event.title: Event Management
event.desc: Registration system for special events, discipleship classes, retreats, and ticketing.

HomePage.footer_quote: "For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them."

Auth.login_subtitle: Enter your church code and credentials.
Auth.register_subtitle: Create a digital space for your church today.

MemberManagementsPage.title: Member Management
MemberManagementsPage.description: Command center for managing congregation data, attendance, and church organizational structure.

directory.title: Member Directory
directory.desc: Add, edit, delete, and manage the entire congregation database.

attendance.title: Member Attendance
attendance.desc: Manage service attendance, recaps, and attendance reports.

structure.title: Structure Management
structure.desc: Set positions, ministry roles, and church organizational hierarchy.
